title: Verify immutable manifest review and approval
preconditions: Committable and blocked manifest revisions with changed facts, decisions, and versions are available.
steps: Inspect, approve, mutate decisions, attempt source-fact edits, and request commit approval for exact and mismatched revisions.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-MANIFEST-REVIEW holds; only one exact fully reconciled revision can be approved and any change creates a new revision.
